title: TransactionFrameDestination
description: Neynar Farcaster API schema for TransactionFrameDestination

amount.description: Amount to send (must be greater than 0)

token_contract_address.description: Token contract address for the payment (e.g. 0x833589fcd6edb6e08f4c7c32d4f71b54bda02913 is USDC on Base)
